label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Firefox emphasizes privacy by default with minimal telemetry collection. Telemetry is opt-in and can be easily disabled. Mozilla is a non-profit organization committed to open-source principles. Strong support for privacy signals (GPC, DNT).
